productDisplayName: Puma Men White Mid Ducati Shoes
description: Style Note  These stylish 65cc Mid Ducati shoes from puma have a motorsport friendly design, and are perfect for both training and urban wear. These shoes are infused with the Ducati edge and their attractive low-profile design looks great when teamed with jeans and a tee for a cool casual look. Product Details White shoe with leather upper, central lace-ups, synthetic overlays and stitched detailing The medial side of the mouth is taller than the lateral Padded tongue and inner Thick rubber midsole TPU outsole with patterned grooves Material and Care Leather, synthetic Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
